headline: A Look At Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business profile Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) has been on many investors’ radar after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, year to date, and past year. Against that backdrop, the company continues to run a sizeable investor communications and financial technology business, with annual revenue of about US$7.2b and net income of roughly US$1.1b, split mainly between its...
